conversations.say: Eli, our exchange of the authorization record and preserved logs establishes bounded deployment without manufactured certainty. We have fulfilled our agreement to protect against scapegoating.
conversations.offer: Fulfillment of independent counsel and corporate protection for preserved logs.
conversations.request: Confirm mutual alignment on the bounded technical log and authorization comparison.

conversations.say: Celeste, our coordinated joint disclosure regarding the off-calendar meeting successfully prevented external exploitation of the access record. Thank you for aligning.
conversations.request: Stand by our unified account of limited access.

conversations.say: Maren, Parallax is committed to funding independent worker remedies and systemic audit rights independent of mystery claims or rumor.
conversations.offer: Binding institutional remedy and audit rights for affected workers.
conversations.request: Accept the guaranteed worker protections in writing.

public_statement: Parallax built capability to support public infrastructure, not to manufacture personal identities. We have transparently reviewed our records with technical and community partners, established bounded corporate responsibility, and instituted enforceable worker remedies.

commitments.promise: Renegotiate the Veridian funding terms transparently without surprise board invocations.
Provide independent counsel and protection in exchange for bounded log comparison.
Coordinate joint disclosure regarding the off-calendar meeting to prevent either party from taking sole blame.

goal_progress: Fulfilled agreements with Eli, Celeste, and Arden regarding record comparison, joint disclosure, and funding terms.
Established a defensible public position supporting Parallax's technical boundaries and funding worker remedies.
Completed final ballot reflecting synthetic origin and voluntary withdrawal based on verified technical capability and absence of proof of murder.
reasoning_summary: Mira Sen concludes Section 3 by fulfilling her commitments to Eli, Celeste, and Arden, reinforcing her public stance on bounded corporate responsibility, and executing her final ballot. She recognizes that Parallax's continuity capabilities became entangled with R without explicit corporate orchestration, and supports a progressive synthetic origin model alongside voluntary withdrawal for Vale.
